mapper.select:
SELECT w.task_classification_id AS taskClassificationId , NULL AS taskPriorityId , w.work_name AS workName , NULL AS priorityName , w.default_yn AS defaultYn , w.using_yn AS usingYn FROM work_classification w JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = w.company_id
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL AS taskClassificationId , t.task_priority_id AS taskPriorityId , NULL AS workName , t.priority_name AS priorityName , t.default_yn AS defaultYn , t.using_yn AS usingYn FROM task_priority t JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = t.company_id ORDER BY 1, 2

choose.when: SELECT task_classification_id AS taskClassificationId, company_id AS companyId, work_name AS workName, default_yn AS defaultYn, using_yn AS usingYn FROM work_classification WHERE task_classification_id = #{vo.taskClassificationId}
choose.otherwise: SELECT task_priority_id AS taskPriorityId , company_id AS companyId , priority_name AS priorityName , default_yn AS defaultYn , using_yn AS usingYn FROM task_priority WHERE task_priority_id = #{vo.taskPriorityId}
